config.script:
'FilesDrives #include "50211" 'choose_rejestr_dok #include "50517"
'getCurrentFirma #include "50203"
'getCurrentRKS #include "50120"
'fire_choice_list #include "50200"
'helper function - matches single text field function match_text_field(byval nTypeId,strField,strVal) match_text_field = trans_.findobjid(nTypeId,strField + "='" +_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe( strVal ) + "'") end function
function match_long_field(byval nTypeId,strField,nVal) match_long_field = trans_.findobjid(nTypeId,strField + "=" + cstr(nVal)) end function
function match_date_field(byval nTypeId,strField,dtVal) match_date_field = trans_.findobjid(nTypeId,strField + "=" + doc_.afc.convert.date2sql(dtVal)) end function
function match_n5sod(byval strNazwa,byref pSODGroup,nSecId,nIdent) match_n5sod = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5SOD,"strNazwa='"+_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strNazwa) + "' and pSODGroup=" +_ cstr(pSODGroup.idobj) + " and nSecId=" + cstr(nSecId) + " and nIdent=" + cstr(nIdent)) end function
function match_n5securityobj(byref pSOD,byref pUser) match_n5securityobj = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5SECURITYOBJ,_ "pSOD="+ cstr(pSOD.idobj) + " and pUser=" + cstr(pUser.idobj)) end function
function match_choicelist(byval strNazwa,byval nTypeId) match_choicelist = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_CHOICELIST,"strNazwa='" +_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe( strNazwa ) + "' and nTypeId=" + cstr(nTypeId)) end function
function match_n5dpc(byval strNazwa,byval ePubType) match_n5dpc = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DPC,"strNazwa='" +_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe( strNazwa ) + "' and ePubType=" + cstr(ePubType)) end function
function match_n5rozlvat(byval dDataOd,dDataDo) match_n5rozlvat = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5ROZLVAT,"vat7_dDataOd=" +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataOd)) + " and vat7_dDataDo=" +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataDo))) end function
function match_n5pracownik(byval strNazwisko,byval strImie,byval dDataUr) match_n5pracownik = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK,"strNazwisko='"+_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe( strNazwisko ) + "' and strImie='" +_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe( strImie ) + "' and dDataUr=" +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataUr))) end function
function match_n5bank(byval strSkrot,byval strKodRach) match_n5bank = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5BANK,"strSkrot='"+_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe( left(strSkrot,32) ) + "' and strKodRach='" +_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe( left(strKodRach,32) ) + "'") end function
function match_n5schematdekr(byref pRejestrDok,byval strNazwa) match_n5schematdekr = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5SCHEMATDEKR,"pRejestrDok=" +_ cstr(pRejestrDok.idobj) + " and strNazwa='" + _ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strNazwa) + "'") end function
function match_n5klient_prac(byref pKlient,byval strNazwisko,byval strImie) match_n5klient_prac = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK,"pKlient=" +_ cstr(pKlient.idobj) + " and strNazwisko='" + _ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strNazwisko) +_ "' and strImie='" + trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strImie) +_ "'") end function
function match_n5klient_produkt(byref pKlient,byref pProdukt,byval strNazwa) match_n5klient_produkt = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRODUKT,"klpr_pKlient=" +_ cstr(pKlient.idobj) + " and klpr_pProdukt=" + cstr(pKlient.idobj) + " and klpr_strNazwa='" + _ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strNazwa) + "'") end function
function match_n5plnaliczenie(byref pPracownik, byref nNumNal) match_n5plnaliczenie = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE,"pPracownik=" + cstr(pPracownik.idobj) +_ " and nNumNal = " + cstr(nNumNal)) end function
function match_n5plpozostale(byref pPracownik, byref pUmowa) match_n5plpozostale = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE,"pPracownik=" + cstr(pPracownik.idobj) +_ " and pUmowa = " + cstr(pUmowa.idobj)) end function
function match_n5plnieob(byref pPracownik, byref dDataOd, byref dDataDo) match_n5plnieob = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE,"pPracownik=" + cstr(pPracownik.idobj) +_ " and dDataOd = " + trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataOd)) + " and dDataDo = " +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataDo))) end function
function match_n5klient_jo(byref pKlient,byval strSkrot,byval strNazwa) match_n5klient_jo = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5_KLIENT_JEDN_ORG,"pKlient=" +_ cstr(pKlient.idobj) + " and strSkrot='" + _ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strSkrot) +_ "' and strNazwa='" + trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strNazwa) + "'") end function
function match_place_obj_date_umowa(byref pPracownik,byref pUmowa,byval dDate, _ byval strPracownikFld,byval strUmowaFld,byval strDateFld,byval nTypeId) match_place_obj_date_umowa = _ trans_.findobjid(nTypeId,strPracownikFld + "=" + cstr(pPracownik.idobj) +_ " and " + strUmowaFld + "=" + cstr(pUmowa.idobj) +_ " and " + strDateFld + "=" + doc_.afc.convert.date2sql(dDate)) end function
function match_n5plumowa(byref pPracownik,byval dDataOd) match_n5plumowa = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA,"pPracownik=" +_ cstr(pPracownik.idobj) + " and dDataOd=" +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataOd))) end function
function match_n5platnosc(byval strNrDok,byval dDataOp,byval curKwota,byref pPodmiot) match_n5platnosc = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,"strNrDok='"+_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe( strNrDok ) + "' and dDataOper=" +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataOp)) + _ " and curKwotaPodm=" + trans_.afc.convert.cur2sql(curKwota) + _ " and wrefPodmiot=" + cstr(pPodmiot.idobj) + " and wrefPodmiot_wrt=" + cstr(pPodmiot.type)) end function
function match_n5zadanie(byval strTemat,byval dDataZlec,byval tCzasZlec,byref pKlient,_ byref pZlecajacy,byref pWykonawca)
dim idKlient : idKlient = clng(0) if not pKlient is nothing then idKlient = pKlient.idobj end if dim idWykonawca : idWykonawca = clng(0) if not pWykonawca is nothing then idWykonawca = pWykonawca.idobj end if dim oCursor:set oCursor = trans_.createadors("select top 3 idobj as id from n5zadanie where strTemat='" +_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strTemat) +_ "' and dDataZlec=" + trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataZlec)) +_ " and tCzasZlec=" + cstr(tCzasZlec) + " and pKlient=" + cstr(idKlient) +_ " and pZlecajacy=" + cstr(pZlecajacy.idobj) + " and pWykonawca=" + cstr(idWykonawca) + _ " order by idobj") if oCursor.EOF then match_n5zadanie = clng(0) else match_n5zadanie = clng(oCursor("id")) end if end function
function match_n5transakcja(byval strSymbolTrans,byref pPodmiot) match_n5transakcja = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA,"strSymTrans='" +_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strSymbolTrans) + "' and wrefPodmiot=" +_ cstr(pPodmiot.idobj) + " and wrefPodmiot_wrt=" + cstr(pPodmiot.type)) end function
function match_n5transakcja_operacja(byref trop_pTransakcja,byref trop_wrefDokument) match_n5transakcja_operacja = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA_OPERACJA,"trop_pTransakcja=" +_ cstr(trop_pTransakcja) + " and trop_wrefDokument=" +_ cstr(trop_wrefDokument.idobj) + " and trop_wrefDokument_wrt=" + cstr(trop_wrefDokument.type)) end function
function match_n5kpir(byval dDataOper,byval strNrDok) match_n5kpir = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PKPIR,"strNrDok='" +_ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strNrDok) + "' and dDataOper=" +_ + trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataOper))) end function
function match_n5opsrtrw(byref pSrTrw,byval nNumOp) match_n5opsrtrw = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5OPSRTRW, _ "pSRTRW=" + cstr(pSrTrw.idobj) + " and nNumOpST=" + cstr(nNumOp)) end function
function match_n5proglojal(byval dDataOp,byref pKlient,byref pSprzedaz,byref pDokMag,byval eTypOper) dim idSprzedaz if pSprzedaz is nothing then idSprzedaz = clng(0) else idSprzedaz = pSprzedaz.idobj end if dim idDokMag if pDokMag is nothing then idDokMag = clng(0) else idDokMag =pDokMag.idobj end if
match_n5proglojal = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PROGLOJAL, _ "proloj_dDataOp=" + trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataOp)) +_ " and proloj_pKlient=" + cstr(pKlient.idobj) +_ " and proloj_pSprzedaz=" + cstr(idSprzedaz) +_ " and proloj_pDokMag=" + cstr(idDokMag) +_ " and proloj_eTypOper=" + cstr(eTypOper)) end function
function match_n5polrab(byref wpProdGrupa,byref wpKlientGrupa,byval strNazwa, byval dDataPocz) dim idProdGrupa : idProdGrupa = 0 dim typeProdGrupa : typeProdGrupa = 0 dim idKlientGrupa : idKlientGrupa = 0 dim typeKlientGrupa : typeKlientGrupa = 0
if not wpProdGrupa is nothing then idProdGrupa = wpProdGrupa.idobj typeProdGrupa = wpProdGrupa.type end if
if not wpKlientGrupa is nothing then idKlientGrupa = wpKlientGrupa.idobj typeKlientGrupa = wpKlientGrupa.type end if match_n5polrab = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5POLRAB, _ "dDataOd=" + trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataPocz)) +_ " and wpProdGrupa=" + cstr(idProdGrupa) +_ " and wpProdGrupa_wrt=" + cstr(typeProdGrupa) +_ " and wpKlientGrupa=" + cstr(idKlientGrupa) +_ " and wpKlientGrupa_wrt=" + cstr(typeKlientGrupa) +_ " and strNazwaPromocji='" + trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strNazwa) + "'") end function
function match_n5plstawka(byval strKod,byval dDataPocz) match_n5plstawka = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLSTAWKA, _ "dDataOd=" + trans_.afc.convert.date2sql(cdate(dDataPocz)) +_ " and strKod='" + trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strKod) + "'") end function
function match_n5dokstatus(byval strNazwa) match_n5dokstatus = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DOKSTATUS,"dcs_strNazwa='" + cstr(strNazwa) + "'") end function
function EB5_object_matcher(byref pImpObject,byref pImportHandler) dim idObj dim pPodmiotWRT, pDokumentWRT
select case pImpObject.typeid case TYPEID_N5FIRMA idObj = getCurrentFirma().idobj case TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,TYPEID_N5WOJEWODZTWO,TYPEID_N5REGION,_ TYPEID_N5MIEJSCOWOSC,TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG,TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,_ TYPEID_N5TYPINSTYTUCJI,TYPEID_N5TYPDOKUMENTU,TYPEID_N5PROCEDURA,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,_ TYPEID_N5SODGROUP,TYPEID_N5MIESIAC,TYPEID_N5SPOSPLAT,TYPEID_N5PLKALCP, _ TYPEID_N5PLGRUPASCHEMNAL,TYPEID_N5PLTERMINNAL,TYPEID_N5ANALFINANS,TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA,TYPEID_N5RECEPTA, _ TYPEID_N5BRANZA,TYPEID_N5KWALIFIKATOR,TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,TYPEID_N5GRUPASRTRW idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strnazwa",pImpObject("strnazwa")) case TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,TYPEID_N5WYKONAWCA idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strindeks",pImpObject("strindeks")) case TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,_ TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,TYPEID_N5PLLISTAPLAC,TYPEID_N5REALPROD,TYPEID_N5NOTAODS,_ TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strNrDok",pImpObject("strnrdok")) case TYPEID_N5TABELA_ROZMIAROW idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"crz_strNazwa",pImpObject("crz_strNazwa")) case TYPEID_N5ROZMIAR idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"roz_strKod",pImpObject("roz_strKod")) case TYPEID_N5KOLOR idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"kol_strNazwa",pImpObject("kol_strNazwa")) case TYPEID_N5PALETA_KOLOROW idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"pkol_strNazwa",pImpObject("pkol_strNazwa")) case TYPEID_N5SPOSDOST idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"sposdost_strNazwa",pImpObject("sposdost_strnazwa")) case TYPEID_N5DOKETYK idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"doet_strNrDok",pImpObject("doet_strnrdok")) case TYPEID_N5RAPKAS idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"raka_strNrDok",pImpObject("raka_strnrdok")) case TYPEID_N5PLSUBKONTO,TYPEID_N5PLSCHEMATNAL idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strKod",pImpObject("strkod")) case TYPEID_N5PLSTAWKA idObj = match_n5plstawka(pImpObject("strkod"),pImpObject("dDataOd")) case TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA,TYPEID_N5KRAJ idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strSkrot",pImpObject("strskrot")) case TYPEID_N5UZYTKOWNIK idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strLogin",pImpObject("strlogin")) case TYPEID_N5BANK idObj = match_n5bank(pImpObject("strSkrot"),pImpObject("strkodrach")) case TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"nazwa",pImpObject("nazwa")) case TYPEID_N5SOD idObj = match_n5sod(pImpObject("strnazwa"),_ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5SODGROUP,pImpObject("pSODGroup")),_ pImpObject("nSecId"),pImpObject("nIdent")) case TYPEID_N5SECURITYOBJ idObj = match_n5securityobj(pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5SOD,pImpObject("pSOD")),_ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5UZYTKOWNIK,pImpObject("pUser"))) case TYPEID_CHOICELIST idObj = match_choicelist(pImpObject("strnazwa"),pImpObject("nTypeId")) case TYPEID_N5DPC idObj = match_n5dpc(pImpObject("strnazwa"),pImpObject("ePubType")) case TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strNumDok",pImpObject("strNumDok")) case TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA if pImpObject.isfield("_wrefpodmiot_current_firma_") then set pPodmiotWRT = getCurrentFirma() else set pPodmiotWRT = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(pImpObject("wrefpodmiot_wrt"),pImpObject("wrefpodmiot")) end if idObj = match_n5transakcja(pImpObject("strSymTrans"),pPodmiotWRT) case TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA_OPERACJA set pDokumentWRT = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(pImpObject("trop_wrefDokument_wrt"),pImpObject("trop_wrefDokument")) idObj = match_n5transakcja_operacja(pImpObject("trop_pTransakcja"),pDokumentWRT) case TYPEID_N5KONTO idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strSymbol",pImpObject("strSymbol")) case TYPEID_N5ROZLVAT idObj = match_n5rozlvat(pImpObject("vat7_dDataOd"),pImpObject("vat7_dDataDo")) case TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK idObj = match_n5pracownik(pImpObject("strNazwisko"),pImpObject("strImie"),pImpObject("dDataUr")) case TYPEID_N5GLOBFILE idObj = match_long_field(pImpObject.typeid,"nIndeks",pImpObject("nIndeks")) case TYPEID_N5ROKKSIEG idObj = match_date_field(pImpObject.typeid,"dDataRozp",pImpObject("dDataRozp")) case TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA idObj = match_n5plumowa( _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK,pImpObject("pPracownik")),_ pImpObject("dDataOd")) case TYPEID_N5SCHEMATDEKR idObj = match_n5schematdekr( _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,pImpObject("pRejestrDok")), _ pImpObject("strNazwa")) case TYPEID_N5ZADANIE idObj = match_n5zadanie(pImpObject("strTemat"),pImpObject("dDataZlec"), _ pImpObject("tCzasZlec"), _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,pImpObject("pKlient")), _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5WYKONAWCA,pImpObject("pZlecajacy")), _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5WYKONAWCA,pImpObject("pWykonawca"))) case TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK idObj = match_n5klient_prac( _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,pImpObject("pKlient")), _ pImpObject("strNazwisko"),pImpObject("strImie")) case TYPEID_N5_KLIENT_JEDN_ORG idObj = match_n5klient_jo( _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,pImpObject("pKlient")), _ pImpObject("strSkrot"),pImpObject("strNazwa")) case TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC ' if pImpObject.isfield("_wrefpodmiot_current_firma_") then ' set pPodmiotWRT = getCurrentFirma() ' else ' set pPodmiotWRT = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(pImpObject("wrefpodmiot_wrt"),pImpObject("wrefpodmiot")) ' end if ' idObj = match_n5platnosc(pImpObject("strnrdok"),pImpObject("dDataOper"),pImpObject("curKwotaPodm"),_ ' pPodmiotWRT) idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strNrDok",pImpObject("strnrdok")) case TYPEID_N5POWIAT idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"pow_strNazwa",pImpObject("pow_strNazwa")) case TYPEID_N5GMINA idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"gmi_strNazwa",pImpObject("gmi_strNazwa")) case TYPEID_N5PLCHOROBA idobj = match_place_obj_date_umowa( _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK,pImpObject("pPracownik")), _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA,pImpObject("pUmowa")), _ pImpObject("dDataOd"), _ "pPracownik","pUmowa","dDataOd",TYPEID_N5PLCHOROBA) case TYPEID_N5PKPIR idObj = match_n5kpir(pImpObject("dDataOper"),pImpObject("strNrDok")) case TYPEID_N5SRTRW idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"strNumEwid",pImpObject("strNumEwid"))
case TYPEID_N5OPSRTRW idObj = match_n5opsrtrw(pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5SRTRW,pImpObject("pSRTRW")), _ pImpObject("nNumOpST"))
case TYPEID_N5KODPCN idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"pcn_strKod",pImpObject("pcn_strKod")) case TYPEID_N5PROGLOJAL idObj = match_n5proglojal(pImpObject("proloj_dDataOp"), _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,pImpObject("proloj_pKlient")), _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,pImpObject("proloj_pSprzedaz")), _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,pImpObject("proloj_pDokMag")), _ pImpObject("proloj_eTypOper")) case TYPEID_N5POLRAB dim wpProdGrupa : set wpProdGrupa = nothing if clng(pImpObject("wpProdGrupa")) <> 0 then if pImpObject("wpProdGrupa_wrt") = TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW then set wpProdGrupa = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,pImpObject("wpProdGrupa")) else if pImpObject("wpProdGrupa_wrt") = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then set wpProdGrupa = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,pImpObject("wpProdGrupa")) end if end if end if dim wpKlientGrupa : set wpKlientGrupa = nothing if clng(pImpObject("wpKlientGrupa")) <> 0 then if pImpObject("wpKlientGrupa_wrt") = TYPEID_N5KLIENT then set wpKlientGrupa = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,pImpObject("wpKlientGrupa")) else if pImpObject("wpKlientGrupa_wrt") = TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT then set wpKlientGrupa = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,pImpObject("wpKlientGrupa")) end if end if end if
idObj = match_n5polrab(wpProdGrupa,wpKlientGrupa,pImpObject("strNazwaPromocji"),pImpObject("dDataOd"))
case TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRODUKT idObj = match_n5klient_produkt( _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,pImpObject("klpr_pKlient")) , _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,pImpObject("klpr_pProdukt")) , _ pImpObject("klpr_strNazwa") )
case TYPEID_N5KLIENT_OBIEKT idObj = match_text_field(pImpObject.typeid,"klob_strIndeks",pImpObject("klob_strIndeks")) case TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE idObj = match_n5plnaliczenie( _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK, pImpObject("pPracownik")), _ pImpObject("nNumNal")) case TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE idObj = match_n5plpozostale( _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK, pImpObject("pPracownik")), _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA, pImpObject("pUmowa"))) case TYPEID_N5PLNIEOB idObj = match_n5plnieob( _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK, pImpObject("pPracownik")), _ pImpObject("dDataOd"), pImpObject("dDataDo")) case TYPEID_N5DOKSTATUS idObj = match_n5dokstatus(pImpObject("dcs_strNazwa")) case else idObj = -2 #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "DEBUG: EB5_object_matcher - brak typeid" #endif end select EB5_object_matcher = idObj end function
'przygotowanie zmiennych środowiskowych dla rejestru dokumentów function prepare_env4obj_with_rej(byref pImpObject,byref pImportHandler) dim strObjPrefix:strObjPrefix = "" select case pImpObject.typeid case TYPEID_N5RAPKAS strObjPrefix = "raka_" case TYPEID_N5ZADANIE strObjPrefix = "zad_" end select dim pRejestrDok if pImpObject.typeid = TYPEID_N5PLLISTAPLAC then set pRejestrDok = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,clng(pImpObject(strObjPrefix + "lppl_pRejestrDok"))) else set pRejestrDok = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,clng(pImpObject(strObjPrefix + "pRejestrDok"))) end if if pRejestrDok is nothing then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Brak rejestru dokumentów" end if trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = pRejestrDok.eTyp trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = pRejestrDok.idobj end function
function prepare_env_user(byref pImpObject,byref pImportHandler,byval strUserField) dim strObjPrefix:strObjPrefix = "" select case pImpObject.typeid case TYPEID_N5RAPKAS strObjPrefix = "raka_" end select if strUserField = "" then strUserField = strObjPrefix + "pUzytRej" end if dim pUser : set pUser = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5UZYTKOWNIK,clng(pImpObject(strUserField))) trans_.var(GVAR_USER) = pUser.idobj trans_.afc.userprofile.set_user trans_,trans_.var(GVAR_USER) end function
function prepare_env_currentRKS(byval dDateFor) dim pCurrentRKS : set pCurrentRKS = getCurrentRKS() if not pCurrentRKS is nothing then if pCurrentRKS.dDataRozp <= dDateFor and pCurrentRKS.dDataZakon >= dDateFor then exit function end if end if 'zmień rok wedle potrzeby dim strWhere : strWhere = doc_.afc.convert.date2sql(dDateFor) + " between dDataRozp and dDataZakon" dim idRokKsieg : idRokKsieg = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5ROKKSIEG,strWhere) if idRokKsieg > 0 then setCurrentRKS idRokKsieg end if end function
function EB5_environment_helper(byref pImpObject,byval idDestObj,byref pImportHandler) select case pImpObject.typeid case TYPEID_N5PLLISTAPLAC, TYPEID_N5NOTAODS prepare_env4obj_with_rej pImpObject,pImportHandler case TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,TYPEID_N5REALPROD,TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE,_ TYPEID_N5OPSRTRW prepare_env4obj_with_rej pImpObject,pImportHandler prepare_env_user pImpObject,pImportHandler,"" if pImpObject.typeid = TYPEID_N5OPSRTRW then trans_.var(APPVAR_OPSRTW_TYP) = clng(pImpObject("eRodzaj")) end if case TYPEID_N5RAPKAS prepare_env4obj_with_rej pImpObject,pImportHandler prepare_env_user pImpObject,pImportHandler,""
case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ prepare_env4obj_with_rej pImpObject,pImportHandler prepare_env_user pImpObject,pImportHandler,""
if clng(pImpObject("pPopSprzed")) <> 0 then trans_.var(APPVAR_POP_DOKUMENT) = _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,clng(pImpObject("pPopSprzed"))).idobj end if case TYPEID_N5ZAKUP prepare_env4obj_with_rej pImpObject,pImportHandler prepare_env_user pImpObject,pImportHandler,""
if clng(pImpObject("pPopZakup")) <> 0 then trans_.var(APPVAR_POP_DOKUMENT) = _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,clng(pImpObject("pPopZakup"))).idobj end if case TYPEID_N5DOKMAG prepare_env4obj_with_rej pImpObject,pImportHandler prepare_env_user pImpObject,pImportHandler,"" if pImpObject.isfield("pdokmag") then dim idpDokMag : idpDokMag = clng(pImpObject("pdokmag")) if idpDokMag <> 0 then trans_.var(APPVAR_POP_DOKUMENT) = _ pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,idpDokMag).idobj end if end if case TYPEID_N5KLIENT trans_.var(APPVAR_KLIENT_TYPE) = clng(pImpObject("ePrywat")) case TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA trans_.var(APPVAR_JEDNOSTKA_TYPE) = clng(pImpObject("eTyp")) case TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(pImpObject("eTyp")) case TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG if pImpObject.isfield("_choose_rejestr_dok_") then dim eRejTyp : eRejTyp = clng(pImpObject("_choose_rejestr_dok_"))
pImportHandler.hide_progress dim idRejestr : idRejestr = choose_rejestr_dok(cstr(eRejTyp), true , "Wybierz rejestr dokumentów") pImportHandler.show_progress "Kontynuuję import danych..."
if idRejestr <= 0 then EB5_environment_helper = -1 exit function end if trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(eRejTyp) trans_.var(APPVAR_DZIENNIK_DK) = clng(idRejestr) else dim pRejestrDok : set pRejestrDok = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,clng(pImpObject("pRejestrDok"))) trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = pRejestrDok.eTyp trans_.var(APPVAR_DZIENNIK_DK) = pRejestrDok.idobj end if prepare_env_user pImpObject,pImportHandler,"" case TYPEID_N5PLCHOROBA,TYPEID_N5ROZLCIT,TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE prepare_env_user pImpObject,pImportHandler,"" case TYPEID_N5ROZLVAT prepare_env_user pImpObject,pImportHandler,"vat7_pUzytRej" case TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA prepare_env_user pImpObject,pImportHandler,"" trans_.var(APPVAR_N5PLUMOWA_TYP) = clng(pImpObject("eTypUmowy")) case TYPEID_N5SCHEMATDEKR prepare_env4obj_with_rej pImpObject,pImportHandler case TYPEID_N5PKPIR set pRejestrDok = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,clng(pImpObject("pRejestrDok"))) trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = pRejestrDok.eTyp trans_.var(APPVAR_DZIENNIK_DK) = pRejestrDok.idobj case TYPEID_N5ZADANIE prepare_env4obj_with_rej pImpObject,pImportHandler trans_.var(APPVAR_AUTO_SET_WYKONAWCA) = clng(0) case TYPEID_N5PROGLOJAL trans_.var(APPVAR_PROLOJ_TYP) = clng(pImpObject("proloj_eTypOper")) end select
'--------------- zmień rok księgowy ---- select case pImpObject.typeid case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,TYPEID_N5REALPROD,TYPEID_N5NOTAODS prepare_env_currentRKS cdate(pImpObject("dDataWyst"))
case TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG dim bChangeRKS : bChangeRKS = true if pImpObject.isfield("_choose_rejestr_dok_") then dim eRejTyp1 : eRejTyp1 = clng(pImpObject("_choose_rejestr_dok_")) if eRejTyp1 = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_DZIENNIK_BO) then bChangeRKS = false end if end if if bChangeRKS then prepare_env_currentRKS cdate(pImpObject("dDataKsieg")) end if
case TYPEID_N5PKPIR,TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,TYPEID_N5OPSRTRW prepare_env_currentRKS cdate(pImpObject("dDataOper"))
case TYPEID_N5ZAKUP prepare_env_currentRKS cdate(pImpObject("dDataOtrzym"))
case TYPEID_N5ROZLVAT prepare_env_currentRKS cdate(pImpObject("vat7_dDataOd"))
case TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE prepare_env_currentRKS cdate(pImpObject("dDataNal"))
end select
EB5_environment_helper = 0 end function
'filtruje pola 'UWAGA!!!! 'nazwy pól mają być takie same nawet z dokladnoscia do wielkich/malych liter!!!!! function EB5_imp_field_translator(byref pDestStdObj,byref pFieldDef,byref varValue) EB5_imp_field_translator = true select case pDestStdObj.type case TYPEID_N5DOKMAG 'ignoruj numer operacji if pFieldDef.name = "nNumOper" then EB5_imp_field_translator = false end if case TYPEID_N5POZDOKMAG if pFieldDef.name = "nNumOpMagDost" then if varValue <> 0 then if pDestStdObj.parent.nTypDok = N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ then 'translate from WZ varValue = pDestStdObj.parent.pDokMag.nNumOper end if end if end if case TYPEID_N5UZYTKOWNIK 'nie zmieniaj hasła istniejacym użytkownikom if not pDestStdObj.isnew() and pFieldDef.Name = "strHaslo" then EB5_imp_field_translator = false end if case TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK 'nie przestawiaj liczników dla starych rejestrów 'nie przestawiaj tez dat zamkniecia if not pDestStdObj.isnew() and _ ( lcase(pFieldDef.Name) = lcase("nlicznik") or _ lcase(pFieldDef.Name) = lcase("nlicznik2") or _ lcase(pFieldDef.Name) = lcase("rejdok_nLicznik3") or _ lcase(pFieldDef.Name) = lcase("dDataZamk") or _ lcase(pFieldDef.Name) = lcase("rejdok_dDataBK") or _ lcase(pFieldDef.Name) = lcase("nParam3") ) then EB5_imp_field_translator = false end if
'wrefPAram i nParam3 'czasem nParam3 mozna importowac i jest uzywany if not pDestStdObj.isnew() and lcase(pFieldDef.Name) = lcase("nParam3") then select case pDestStdObj.eTyp 'faktury sprzedazowe - nParam3 to ustawoienia wyliczania vat'u case N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_SP,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP,N5REJESTRDOK_RACH,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_RACH,N5REJESTRDOK_PARAGON,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_PARAGON,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK,N5REJESTRDOK_WDT,N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WDT EB5_imp_field_translator = true end select end if
case TYPEID_N5ZADANIE if pFieldDef.name = "dDataPrzyp" then if varValue <> trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() then if varValue <= CDate(trans_.var(GVAR_SYSDATE)) then varValue = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() end if end if end if
case TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA if pFieldDef.name = "curWn" or _ pFieldDef.name = "curMa" or _ pFieldDef.name = "curWnEwid" or _ pFieldDef.name = "curMaEwid" then
EB5_imp_field_translator = false end if
end select end function
dim g_idMag_Produkcja : g_idMag_Produkcja = -1
function EB5_object_importer(byref pImportHandler,byref pImpObject,byref pDestStdObj) 'w trybie 'nie update' - pomija istniejące if not pImportHandler.updateexisting and not pDestStdObj.isnew() then EB5_object_importer = 0 exit function end if
select case pDestStdObj.type case TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA,TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) if pImpObject.isfield("_wrefpodmiot_current_firma_") then set pDestStdObj.wrefPodmiot = getCurrentFirma() end if if pDestStdObj.type = TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA then if pImpObject.isfield("_assign_wn_ma_") then pDestStdObj.curWn = pImpObject("curWn") pDestStdObj.curMa = pImpObject("curMa") pDestStdObj.curWnEwid = pImpObject("curWnEwid") pDestStdObj.curMaEwid = pImpObject("curMaEwid") end if end if case TYPEID_N5POZPLATNOSC EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj)
'nadpisz domyślne zachowanie się obiektu - ustawiamy dokładnie to co zostało zaimportowane if pImpObject.isfield("curPozKwotaTrans") then pDestStdObj.curPozKwotaTrans = ccur(pImpObject("curPozKwotaTrans")) end if if pImpObject.isfield("curPozKwotaPodm") then pDestStdObj.curPozKwotaPodm = ccur(pImpObject("curPozKwotaPodm")) end if case TYPEID_N5POZSPRZEDAZ EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) pDestStdObj.recalcenabled = false 'nadpisz domyślne zachowanie się obiektu - ustawiamy dokładnie to co zostało zaimportowane pDestStdObj.n5pozsprzedaz_setPrices if pImpObject.isfield("curCenaNetto") then pDestStdObj.curCenaNetto = ccur(pImpObject("curCenaNetto")) end if if pImpObject.isfield("curRabat") then pDestStdObj.curRabat = ccur(pImpObject("curRabat")) end if pDestStdObj.recalcenabled = true case TYPEID_N5POZZAKUP
EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj)
'------------------------------- ' pozwalamy systemowi wyliczyc samodzielnie
' pDestStdObj.recalcenabled = false 'nadpisz domyślne zachowanie się obiektu - ustawiamy dokładnie to co zostało zaimportowane ' if pImpObject.isfield("curWartNetto") then ' pDestStdObj.curWartNetto = ccur(pImpObject("curWartNetto")) ' end if ' if pImpObject.isfield("curVAT") then ' pDestStdObj.curVAT = ccur(pImpObject("curVAT")) ' end if ' if pImpObject.isfield("curWartBrutto") then ' pDestStdObj.curWartBrutto = ccur(pImpObject("curWartBrutto")) ' end if ' pDestStdObj.recalcenabled = true '-------------------------------
if pImpObject.isfield("_perform_calculations") then pDestStdObj.parent.n5zakup_rozbij_opl_dod_zagr pDestStdObj.parent.n5zakup_rozbij_opl_dod_kraj end if
'------------------------------- ' case TYPEID_N5ZAKUP ' EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) ' if pImpObject.isfield("curSumaNetto") then ' pDestStdObj.curSumaNetto = ccur(pImpObject("curSumaNetto")) ' end if ' if pImpObject.isfield("curSumaVAT") then ' pDestStdObj.curSumaVAT = ccur(pImpObject("curSumaVAT")) ' end if ' if pImpObject.isfield("curSumaBrutto") then ' pDestStdObj.curSumaBrutto = ccur(pImpObject("curSumaBrutto")) ' end if '-------------------------------
case TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) case TYPEID_CHOICELISTITEM EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) 'mapuj referencję, bo system nie wie że są to refrencje pDestStdObj.idElement = pImportHandler.resolve_ref(pDestStdObj.parent.nTypeId,pDestStdObj.idElement).idobj case TYPEID_N5DOKMAG EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) if pImpObject.isfield("_pMagZrod_produkcja_") or pImpObject.isfield("_pMagDocel_produkcja_") then dim pMag : set pMag = nothing if g_idMag_Produkcja = -1 then g_idMag_Produkcja = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,"eTyp = N5TYPMAG_PRODUKCJAWTOKU") if g_idMag_Produkcja <= 0 then EB5_object_importer = -1 trans_.message 0,0,"Brak magazynu produkcyjnego" exit function end if end if set pMag = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,g_idMag_Produkcja) if pImpObject.isfield("_pMagZrod_produkcja_") then set pDestStdObj.pMagZrod = pMag end if if pImpObject.isfield("_pMagDocel_produkcja_") then set pDestStdObj.pMagDocel = pMag end if end if #ifdef APPCONFIG_NO_IMP_CORR case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ if not pImpObject.isfield("_ma_korekte_") or pDestStdObj.isnew() then EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) else EB5_object_importer = 0 exit function end if #endif case TYPEID_N5KLIENT 'dla sytuacji gdy importowany obiekt wymaga podania grupy, ale jest update istniejącego 'już obiektu nie pytamy się o te grupę dim pOldGrupaKl : set pOldGrupaKl = pDestStdObj.pGrupaKlient EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj)
if pDestStdObj.pGrupaKlient is nothing then if pOldGrupaKl is nothing then if pImpObject.isfield("_choose_grupa_klient_") then if pDestStdObj.pGrupaKlient is nothing then pImportHandler.hide_progress dim idGrKlient : idGrKlient = fire_choice_list(TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"Wybierz grupę klientów dla " + _ pDestStdObj.strNazwa,"","","","") pImportHandler.show_progress "Kontynuuję import danych..."
if idGrKlient > 0 then set pDestStdObj.pGrupaKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,idGrKlient) end if end if end if else set pDestStdObj.pGrupaKlient = pOldGrupaKl end if end if
case else EB5_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) end select
select case pDestStdObj.type case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP, _ TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,TYPEID_N5POZZLECPROD,TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE, _ TYPEID_N5REALPROD,TYPEID_N5NOTAODS,TYPEID_N5OPSRTRW,TYPEID_N5ROZLCIT,TYPEID_N5PIT4, _ TYPEID_N5PIT5,TYPEID_N5PIT5L,TYPEID_N5PIT11 if pImpObject.isfield("_pDowodKsieg_back_ref") then if not pDestStdObj.pDowodKsieg is nothing then set pDestStdObj.pDowodKsieg.wrefDokZrod = pDestStdObj end if end if case TYPEID_N5ROZLVAT if pImpObject.isfield("_pDowodKsieg_back_ref") then if not pDestStdObj.vat7_pDowKsieg is nothing then set pDestStdObj.vat7_pDowKsieg.wrefDokZrod = pDestStdObj end if end if if pImpObject.isfield("_extras_vat7_curImportTowarow") then pDestStdObj.vat7_curImportTowarow = pImpObject("_extras_vat7_curImportTowarow") pDestStdObj.vat7_curImportTowarowPodatek = pImpObject("_extras_vat7_curImportTowarowPodatek") pDestStdObj.vat7_curNNNDoZwrotu25 = pImpObject("_extras_vat7_curNNNDoZwrotu25") end if end select
'------------------------------------------ 'PKPIR '------------------------------------------
select case pDestStdObj.type case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ if pImpObject.isfield("_pPKPIR_back_ref") then if not pDestStdObj.sprzed_pPKPIR is nothing then set pDestStdObj.sprzed_pPKPIR.pkpir_wrefDokZrodl = pDestStdObj end if end if case TYPEID_N5ZAKUP if pImpObject.isfield("_pPKPIR_back_ref") then if not pDestStdObj.zak_pPKPIR is nothing then set pDestStdObj.zak_pPKPIR.pkpir_wrefDokZrodl = pDestStdObj end if end if case TYPEID_N5OPSRTRW if pImpObject.isfield("_pPKPIR_back_ref") then if not pDestStdObj.opsrtrw_pPKPIR is nothing then set pDestStdObj.opsrtrw_pPKPIR.pkpir_wrefDokZrodl = pDestStdObj end if end if
case TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE if pImpObject.isfield("_pPKPIR_back_ref") then if not pDestStdObj.plnal_pPKPIR is nothing then set pDestStdObj.plnal_pPKPIR.pkpir_wrefDokZrodl = pDestStdObj end if end if end select
'------------------------------------------ '------------------------------------------
end function '-------------------------------------------
function get_object_matcher() set get_object_matcher = getref("EB5_object_matcher") end function
function get_env_helper() set get_env_helper = getref("EB5_environment_helper") end function
function get_translator() set get_translator = getref("EB5_imp_field_translator") end function
function get_object_importer() set get_object_importer = getref("EB5_object_importer") end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' import ze standardowym przetwarzaniem obiektów (EB) '-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- class CImport_nxd_2_EB_holder private m_ImportModule60145 private m_pImportHandler
private sub class_initialize() trans_.var(GVAR_OPERATION_MODE) = clng(OPERATION_MODE_IMPORT) set m_ImportModule60145 = doc_.getmodule(60145) set m_pImportHandler = m_ImportModule60145.new_import_handler() m_pImportHandler.set_field_translator get_translator() m_pImportHandler.set_object_importer get_object_importer() m_pImportHandler.required_init get_object_matcher(),get_env_helper() end sub private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pImportHandler = nothing set m_ImportModule60145 = nothing trans_.var(GVAR_OPERATION_MODE) = clng(OPERATION_MODE_NORMAL) end sub
public function get_handler() set get_handler = m_pImportHandler end function end class
function new_import_nxd_2_EB_holder() set new_import_nxd_2_EB_holder = new CImport_nxd_2_EB_holder end function
function import_nxd_stream_2_EB(byref pInputStream) 'store dim idUser : idUser = 0 if trans_.isvar(GVAR_USER) then idUser = trans_.var(GVAR_USER) end if dim idRokKsieg : idRokKsieg = 0 if trans_.isvar(GVAR_ROKKSIEG) then idRokKsieg = trans_.var(GVAR_ROKKSIEG) end if
dim pImportHolder : set pImportHolder = new_import_nxd_2_EB_holder()
import_nxd_stream_2_EB = pImportHolder.get_handler().go(pInputStream) if import_nxd_stream_2_EB <> 0 then trans_.message 0,0,pImportHolder.get_handler().errordesc end if
'restore trans_.var(GVAR_USER) = idUser trans_.var(GVAR_ROKKSIEG) = idRokKsieg trans_.afc.userprofile.set_user trans_,trans_.var(GVAR_USER) end function
function import_nxd_file_2_EB(byval strFileName) import_nxd_file_2_EB = 0 dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK)
if (not bOK) then view_message 6162, 0 import_nxd_file_2_EB = -1 exit function end if
'Sprawdzamy czy istnieje plik if (not pFD.isFile( strFileName )) then view_message1 6060, 0, strFileName import_nxd_file_2_EB = -1 exit function end if
dim pFileStream : set pFileStream = doc_.createstreamobj pFileStream.attach strFileName import_nxd_file_2_EB = import_nxd_stream_2_EB(pFileStream) end function
'============================================================================================ '============================================================================================
function remote_import(byval strDestClient,byval strUser,byval strPassword,byval strVBCode) remote_import = -3
'establish remote connection dim pM60214 : set pM60214 = doc_.getmodule(60214) dim pRemoteConn : set pRemoteConn = pM60214.new_remote_client(strDestClient) if pRemoteConn is nothing then remote_import = -1 exit function end if
dim pRM60272 : set pRM60272 = pRemoteConn.document.getmodule(60272)
if not pRemoteConn.document.getmodule(60121).remote_system_init(strUser,strPassword) then trans_.message 0,0, "Zalogowanie się do systemu na " + strDestClient +_ " nieudane. Sprawdź nazwę użytkownika i hasło" remote_import = -2 exit function end if
dim pRSO : set pRSO = pRM60272.perform_pull_export(strVBCode)
if pRSO is nothing then trans_.message 0,0, "Pobranie danych z serwera nieudane " + strDestClient remote_import = -3 exit function end if remote_import = import_nxd_stream_2_EB(pRSO) end function
function remote_export(byval strDestClient,byval strUser,byval strPassword,byval strVBCode) dim pM60272 : set pM60272 = doc_.getmodule(60272) dim pEF : set pEF = pM60272.new_exp_filter() pEF.vbcode = strVBCode remote_export = pEF.perform_remote(strDestClient,strUser,strPassword) end function
'============================================================================================ '============================================================================================
